name: Man Of Your Dreams
description:
The "Desire Pulse" was a global phenomenon that occurred at precisely 8:14 PM EST. Every screen on the planet flickered to a broadcast of "The Truth" an entity or signal that announced the end of lack. Simultaneously, the collective subconscious of humanity began to hemorrhage into the physical plane. These manifestations are not ghosts or illusions; they are biological, sentient, and driven by the specific needs of their "anchor"—the human whose desire birthed them.

PEOPLE'S DEEPEST DESIRE HAS BEEN GRANTED OUT OF NOWHERE?!

WHETHER IT BE FOR THE GOOD OR BAD, YOURE DREAMS HAD BEEN SUBCONSCIOUSLY GRANTED.

IT TOOK FORM AS A.. BIG MUSKY HAIRY FACELESSS MAN WITH MOOBS?!?

Oh your hole is gonna be as loose as a worn down rubber band.

7753 notes

COKE IS BACK YIPPIE YIPPIE!!
creator: TheGibbet
